title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at EduComp Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at EduComp Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the EduComp Solutions family as a Curriculum Developer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EduComp Solutions:
EduComp Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EduComp Solutions!
